ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_limit_date" TEXT /* Latest date by which the order should be shipped */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "total_freight" REAL /* Total freight cost for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the order */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Return status of the order (e.g., not returned, returned) */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the order was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in an order */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Reference to the order to which the item belongs */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the product */,
  "seller_id" TEXT /* ID of the seller who provides the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "freight_value" REAL /* Freight cost for the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the product */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Return status of the item (e.g., not returned, returned) */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the order item was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product brand */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the product information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the seller */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the seller */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the seller */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the seller */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the seller joined the platform */,
  "bank_account" TEXT /* Bank account details for the seller */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number for the seller */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed upon with the seller */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the seller information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)
